lessons.title: Hello, Swift! 👋
lessons.description: Your very first steps in the Swift programming language.

lessons.title: Constants vs Variables ⚖️
lessons.description: Learn how to store data that changes (var) and data that doesn't (let).

lessons.title: Data Types 🧩
lessons.description: Understand Strings, Integers, Doubles, and Booleans.

lessons.title: String Interpolation 💬
lessons.description: Mix variables gracefully into your text like magic.

lessons.title: Comments & Naming 📝
lessons.description: Learn how to write secret notes to yourself, and how to name variables properly.
